title: ignition bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.22.0-3.0.1]
- Remove sgdisk requirement and create symbolic link to sgdisk [Orabug: 37470782]

[2.22.0-3]
- spec: backport fips fix and update build with
  goexperiment=strictfipsruntime

[2.22.0-2]
- RHEL-125909: Backport patch to fix device mapper partitioning
full_text:
[2.22.0-3.0.1]
- Remove sgdisk requirement and create symbolic link to sgdisk [Orabug: 37470782]

[2.22.0-3]
- spec: backport fips fix and update build with
  goexperiment=strictfipsruntime

[2.22.0-2]
- RHEL-125909: Backport patch to fix device mapper partitioning

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23289.html
